name: financial-intelligence
description: Berman, Knight & Case's guide to financial literacy for non-financial managers — reading income statements, balance sheets, cash flow statements, ratios, ROI, and working capital management.
useCase: Understanding financial statements, analyzing profit vs cash, calculating ratios, managing working capital, evaluating ROI, building financially literate organizations.
knownRisks: This is an introductory book — it covers fundamentals, not advanced corporate finance
GAAP vs non-GAAP and specific accounting rules can vary by country and jurisdiction
Some concepts (EBITDA, non-GAAP metrics) are controversial among accounting purists
